tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_exactly_one_marked_ticket
tests.trace:
run_id = 'zr-avhgxzr', collection_id = 'zealt-user-default-repo'
ticket_id_from_log = '60'

    @pytest.fixture(scope="session")
    def matching_ticket(run_id: str, collection_id: str, ticket_id_from_log: str) -> dict:
        url = f"{APIDECK_BASE_URL}/issue-tracking/collections/{collection_id}/tickets"
        tickets = _get_paginated(url)
        matches = [
            t
            for t in tickets
            if isinstance(t.get("subject"), str)
            and MARKER in t["subject"]
            and run_id in t["subject"]
        ]
>       assert len(matches) == 1, (
            f"Expected exactly 1 ticket with marker '{MARKER}' and run id '{run_id}', "
            f"got {len(matches)}: subjects={[t.get('subject') for t in matches]}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected exactly 1 ticket with marker '[COMMENT-EDIT-DELETE]' and run id 'zr-avhgxzr', got 4: subjects=['[COMMENT-EDIT-DELETE] zr-avhgxzr', '[COMMENT-EDIT-DELETE] zr-avhgxzr', '[COMMENT-EDIT-DELETE] zr-avhgxzr', '[COMMENT-EDIT-DELETE] zr-avhgxzr']
E       assert 4 == 1
E        +  where 4 = len([{'collection_id': 'zealt-user-default-repo', 'created_at': '2026-06-15T04:52:47.000Z', 'created_by': 'zealt-user01', ...55:33.000Z', 'created_by': 'zealt-user01', 'description': 'Integration test for comment edit & delete workflow.', ...}])
